cmrdesign 0.0.0.9000

    • Pilot planning
    • Paper
    • Python package

Pilot/main-wave planning summary

Source: R/cmr_plan.R
pilot_plan.Rd

Summarize the pilot-size viability band and a default pilot-size suggestion.

Usage

pilot_plan(
  n,
  sigma1,
  sigma0,
  alpha = 0.05,
  method = c("bounded", "bernoulli"),
  input = c("sd", "variance"),
  accounting = c("design_only", "pooled"),
  desired_pilot = NULL,
  strict_upper = TRUE
)

cmr_plan(
  n,
  sigma1,
  sigma0,
  alpha = 0.05,
  method = c("bounded", "bernoulli"),
  input = c("sd", "variance"),
  accounting = c("design_only", "pooled"),
  desired_pilot = NULL,
  strict_upper = TRUE
)

Arguments

n

Total experimental sample size across pilot and main wave.

sigma1

Treatment-arm standard deviation, or variance when input = "variance".

sigma0

Control-arm standard deviation, or variance when input = "variance".

alpha

Target error level.

method

Planning method, either "bounded" or "bernoulli".

input

Whether sigma1 and sigma0 are standard deviations ("sd") or variances ("variance").

accounting

"design_only" applies the break-even pilot-share cap; "pooled" ignores that cap.

desired_pilot

Optional user-proposed pilot size to classify.

strict_upper

If TRUE, feasible pilot sizes must be strictly below the design-only break-even cap.

Value

A list of class cmr_pilot_plan with band, suggested_pilot, default_two_thirds_power, desired_pilot, desired_status, a text recommendation, and a caveat that the screen is necessary rather than sufficient.

See also

Other pilot planning: activation_threshold_bounded(), break_even_pilot_share(), pilot_viability_band()

Examples

cmr_plan(
  n = 1000,
  sigma1 = 0.35,
  sigma0 = 0.20,
  desired_pilot = 100
)
#> $band
#> $n
#> [1] 1000
#> 
#> $sigma
#> $sigma$sigma1
#> [1] 0.35
#> 
#> $sigma$sigma0
#> [1] 0.2
#> 
#> 
#> $alpha
#> [1] 0.05
#> 
#> $method
#> [1] "bounded"
#> 
#> $accounting
#> [1] "design_only"
#> 
#> $break_even_share
#> [1] 0.06923077
#> 
#> $break_even_total
#> [1] 69.23077
#> 
#> $activation_threshold
#> [1] 72
#> 
#> $strict_upper
#> [1] TRUE
#> 
#> $feasible_pilot_sizes
#> integer(0)
#> 
#> $min_feasible
#> [1] NA
#> 
#> $max_feasible
#> [1] NA
#> 
#> $nonempty
#> [1] FALSE
#> 
#> attr(,"class")
#> [1] "cmr_pilot_viability_band" "list"                    
#> 
#> $suggested_pilot
#> [1] 0
#> 
#> $default_two_thirds_power
#> [1] 100
#> 
#> $desired_pilot
#> [1] 100
#> 
#> $desired_status
#> [1] "above_break_even_cap"
#> 
#> $recommendation
#> [1] "No positive pilot size is justified for assignment adaptation by this necessary screen."
#> 
#> $caveat
#> [1] "The viability band is necessary, not sufficient: a feasible pilot must still move the CMR assignment often enough to repay its sampling cost."
#> 
#> attr(,"class")
#> [1] "cmr_pilot_plan" "list"
